jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Nykaa
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nykaa. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Nykaa:
Nykaa is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
